name: Tocopherol
description: Tocopherol is a methylated phenol that possesses a vitamin E activity. It is a natural constituent of many foods. α-Tocopherol is the main source found in oral supplements and in European diet due to olive and sunflower oil intake, while γ-tocopherol is the most common form in the American diet due to a higher intake of soybean and corn oil [Wikipedia]. According to the FDA, tocopherol is generally recognized as safe (GRAS) ingredient added in food substances as a nutrient ingredient as antioxidants or chemical preservative.
